blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
